negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday gap digestion reversal rank over overnight gap size, gap-side residual, gap fill progress, gap extreme recoil, digestion compression, volume cooling, prior-close magnet, VWAP magnet, reversal body turn, opening band reclaim, session phase maturity, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0108 R0001 shows the tested gap digestion reversal surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0108 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0109 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 1 profitable and 8 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -24.62, and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -5.56.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by -6.44 total net PnL across 6 better and 3 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0108 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or gap-digestion-reversal feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday gap digestion reversal rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0108 R0001 tests whether an overnight/session-open gap from the prior day close that partially digests, recoils from its gap-side extreme, cools recent participation, and aligns toward the prior close or session VWAP can form a target-first reversal surface after realistic spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0107 opening drive exhaustion fade. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0107 thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, feature nudges, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.feature: Overnight gap size, gap residual, gap fill progress, gap extreme recoil, digestion compression, volume cooling, prior-close magnet, VWAP magnet, reversal body turn, and opening-band reclaim replace C0107 opening-drive exhaustion features.
surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after gap digestion reversal, not target-first quality after opening drive exhaustion fade.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear gap digestion reversal rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Prior-close-directed top fold-local gap-digestion-reversal state scores per active day.

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: New major campaign surface asks whether partially digested overnight/session gaps can produce target-first reversal edge toward prior close or VWAP after realistic spread cost.

feature.summary: overnight gap size; gap-side residual; gap fill progress; gap extreme recoil; digestion compression; volume cooling; prior-close magnet; VWAP magnet; reversal body turn; opening band reclaim; session phase maturity; spread stress inverse.

label.summary: Target-first quality after gap digestion reversal.

model.summary: Fold-local linear intraday gap digestion reversal rank.

trade_logic.summary: Prior-close-directed top fold-local gap-digestion-reversal scores per active day using next-bar-open fixed-lot discovery entries.
